Here come the Google Ad Agents -> @Google launches AI agent for Ad Manager.

Ask Ad Manager in Google Ad Manageris a new conversational AI agent built with Gemini.

It’s designed to help publishers make faster, more informed decisions by uncovering new insights and automating manual processes right in the UI.

Here is a look at what it can do:

🔍 Faster troubleshooting: Instead of manually sifting through reports, now, you can ask, "Why isn't this line item delivering?" Ask Ad Manager will analyze the situation, diagnose the root cause, and provide the steps to fix it. [...] Ask Ad Manager by Google Ads

results.title: The Brief: AI agents that research, design, launch, and improve ads | Product Hunt
results.content:
Thibault Imbert
The Brief

The Brief

@gowthami\_a Glad you like it! Thank you! Yes, we pull the ads that are live from any brand you want. It does not have to be your competitors necessarily. Then we pass all that context to the AI to analyze them and provide insights. You can also use the chat (agent) to ask questions on anything you want. For instance, tell me what brand X has been focusing on on LinkedIn, or Meta. Or, tell me about potential blind spots that I can tackle to stand out against X? Etc.

Katya Erygina

Congrats on your launch! [...] CindyC

It really looks cool, and nice idea! When will the ‘launching’ phase be launched? And can you then also target countries and different channels?

Beniamin Duca
The Brief

The Brief

Thank you @cindycrijns for the question. We do plan to have it available by the end of this quarter. The Launch agent will be initially a chat experience that has this powerful tools to create and edit campaigns trough direct publishing, so it will manage by default different channels and targeting as well.

In the mean time, everything you create in The Brief right now can be either downloaded or published to Meta or Google trough the interface, really easy. The Agent will take it further and do this automatically in the background, once the campaign plan is approved by you.

Saman Salami
The Brief [...] teams to set and control brand templates at layer level. Would be really great if you can take a spin, its a free (no-card) signup, and let us know your feedback.
